creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I'm changing the summary to make clear that the problem
is not arm specific, despite the initial example the issue
was found with.

stable/11 -r334246 still has the base/head/sys/sys/ktrace.h
(from -r331722 ) problem reported in Comment 2.

Comment 2 also applies to head, see, for example,
base/head/sys/sys/ktrace.h (currently from -r333390 ).

I'm changing the Version to 11.1-STABLE which also
applies, but no one version is the "right" one to
list from what I can tell.

Oleksandr Tymoshenko wrote Comment 2 and so has
seen the issue, but it might have been only for
checking my submittal, not from running into the
issue for normal use. So, for now, I've left it
as "Affects Only Me".

[Over the next weeks/months(?) my access to FreeBSD
contexts will be rather limited. So I'm not likely
to do anything more here over that time.]
